topStories.title: Quote of the day by George Soros: "A boom/bust process occurs only when market prices find a way to influence the so-called fundamentals that are supposed to be reflected in market prices."
topStories.summary: George Soros observed that market prices influence economic fundamentals.  Rising prices attract buyers and encourage business expansion, which alters underlying conditions.  This self-reinforcing loop creates boom periods where optimism fuels further price increases.  Conversely, falling prices reduce confidence and tighten credit, accelerating downturns.  Understanding this interactive system is crucial for navigating financial market dynamics.

topStories.title: India bonds slip as profit booking, higher US yields weigh
topStories.summary: After a turbulent trading day, Indian government bonds ended lower on Tuesday. Profit booking led to a notable spike in the 10-year yield, marking its largest climb in more than two weeks. Caution grew among investors due to rising United States yields, heightened geopolitical tensions in the Middle East, and slightly climbing oil prices. Nevertheless, robust foreign inflows and improved monsoon rainfall mitigated the overall rise in yields.

business.title: Quote of the day by George Soros: "A boom/bust process occurs only when market prices find a way to influence the so-called fundamentals that are supposed to be reflected in market prices."
business.summary: George Soros observed that market prices influence economic fundamentals.  Rising prices attract buyers and encourage business expansion, which alters underlying conditions.  This self-reinforcing loop creates boom periods where optimism fuels further price increases.  Conversely, falling prices reduce confidence and tighten credit, accelerating downturns.  Understanding this interactive system is crucial for navigating financial market dynamics.
